channel.title: Mobasser, A. on Danielle Cosme
channel.description: Recent content in Mobasser, A. on Danielle Cosme

item.title: If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Ross, G. & Pfeifer, J. H. If you’re happy and you know it: Neural correlates of self-evaluated psychological health and well-being. (submitted)

item.title: Choosing to regulate: Does choice enhance craving regulation?
item.description:
Citation:
Cosme, D., Mobasser, A., Zeithamova, D., Berkman E. T., & Pfeifer, J. H. (2018) Choosing to regulate: Does choice enhance craving regulation?. Social Cognitive and Affective Neuroscience, 13(3), 300-309.
